title: calycera viridiflora f. squarrosa
intro: Calycera viridiflora f. squarrosa is a variety of the Calycera viridiflora plant, a perennial herb belonging to the Calyceraceae family, native to the Iberian Peninsula. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Calycera viridiflora f. squarrosa has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. Its health benefits include potentially reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties, although further research is needed to confirm these effects. In herbal preparations, Calycera viridiflora f. squarrosa is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
